POI
Post Office Insurance

POL
Post Office Limited

RC
Remediation Committee (Board subcommittee for RU)

RCC
Risk and Compliance Committee (executive subcommittee)

RU
Remediation Unit (formerly HMU as referred to above), a transformation program separate from BAU

RemCo
Remuneration Committee (Board subcommittee)

SEG
Strategic Executive Group (formerly known as the GE prior to January 2024)

SG
Sarah Gray, Interim GC BAU (whose permanent role is the Group Legal Director)

SID
Senior Independent Director

UKGI
UK Government Investments

WBD
Womble Bond Dickinson
